score_components.formula_applied: Not applicable - instructional content, not performance scoring

confidence_rationale: This video is clearly instructional/promotional content about Stanford Surgery VAMIS Fellowship program. It contains interviews with faculty, aerial campus views, shots of actual OR procedures, and non-standardized laparoscopic trainers. No standardized FLS MISTELS task (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture) is being performed under timed, scored conditions. This is an educational/documentary video about the fellowship program, not an FLS assessment video.
cannot_determine: Task identification - no FLS task is being performed
Completion time - not applicable to instructional content
Performance scoring - this is educational content, not a scored performance
classification_rationale: The video consists of promotional and educational segments including faculty interviews, campus views, brief clips of surgical training/actual surgery in OR settings, and discussion of the fellowship program. There is no evidence of a trainee or surgeon performing a standardized FLS task (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture) on the official FLS MISTELS trainer under timed, proctored conditions. The content is narrated/presentational in nature rather than demonstrating or evaluating task performance.

teaching_content.content_focus: Stanford Surgery VAMIS Fellowship program overview, fellowship benefits, faculty perspectives, surgical training environment

summary: This is a promotional/instructional video about Stanford Surgery's VAMIS Fellowship program. It is not an FLS task performance video and contains no scoreable FLS MISTELS assessments. No scoring is applicable.
